strengths: Demonstrated hands-on experience building event-driven systems and agentic workflows, including MCP frameworks and real-time data pipelines.
Strong full-stack engineering background with production experience in distributed systems, microservices, and high-throughput infrastructure.
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical leadership through workshops, tooling development, and community-driven projects.
concerns: No explicit evidence of leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people or building senior technical leadership layers.
Lack of clear experience in regulated fintech environments, credit risk systems, or financial compliance infrastructure.
Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) and lacks quantified impact, making it hard to assess scale of prior AI-agent deployments.
response.justification: The candidate shows strong technical depth in event-driven systems and emerging agentic frameworks, with relevant tooling experience, but lacks demonstrable leadership at executive scale and any clear exposure to fintech infrastructure, regulatory compliance, or real-world AI systems in high-stakes financial contexts — critical gaps for this role.
